responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?

patterns: How do I apply for admission?
Tell me about the admission process
responses: Thank you for your interest in GD goenka! The admission process starts in August. You can apply online through our website. You'll need your high school transcripts and a completed application form.

patterns: How much are the fees for computer science?
responses: The annual tuition fee for undergraduate programs is Rs 100,000. For specific program fees, please visit the fees section on our website.
We offer a range of courses in Engineering, Business, Arts, and Sciences. Popular programs include Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering, and Business Administration.

patterns: How can I apply for a scholarship?
responses: Yes, we offer a variety of merit-based and need-based scholarships. You can find all the details and application forms on the 'Financial Aid' section of our website.
Our campus is equipped with a modern library, state-of-the-art labs, sports complexes for various games, and several student clubs. There's a vibrant campus life waiting for you!

patterns: How can I contact the college?
Who should I contact for admissions?
responses: You can contact the admissions office at +91 982343XXX or via email at http://gdgoenkauniversity.com/ Our campus is located at Sohna Rural, Haryana.
The application deadline for the upcoming Fall semester is Jully 31st 2025 . We recommend applying early to avail exciting offers!
